title: Context menu improvements and file operations
instructions:
Implement two features:
1. Fix context menu to close when clicking outside of it (on the window or elsewhere)
2. Add new file operation options to the context menu: Remove file, Remove directory, Rename file/dir, Copy, Paste

These require modifications to the file_panel.py for the menu behavior and app.py for the file operations logic.

1783656240.547189.instruction:
Modify file_panel.py to make the context menu close when clicking outside of it. This typically involves:
1. Binding <FocusOut> event to the menu
2. Or binding <Button-1> to the parent widget to destroy/withdraw the menu
3. Ensuring the menu doesn't stay open when user clicks elsewhere in the application

1783656240.547367.instruction:
Extend the context menu in file_panel.py to include new options:
- Remove file
- Remove directory  
- Rename file/dir
- Copy
- Paste

Update the _create_context_menu method to add these new menu items with appropriate separators.

1783656240.5853982.instruction:
Add handler methods in app.py for the new context menu actions:
1. _on_context_remove(path) - Delete file or directory with confirmation
2. _on_context_rename(path) - Rename file/dir with dialog
3. _on_context_copy(path) - Copy file/dir to clipboard/memory
4. _on_context_paste() - Paste from clipboard to current directory
5. Track copied file in memory for paste operation

1783656240.5855157.instruction: Update _on_context_menu in app.py to handle the new action types ('remove', 'rename', 'copy', 'paste') and route them to the appropriate handler methods.
